label: Style item tag weighted
description: Associates a style item tag with a base weight and optional curve factor for hair and style selection during pawn generation.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Hair or style item tag to weight during selection.

baseWeight.label: Base weight
baseWeight.description: Base selection weight for this tag. Higher values increase the probability of this tag being chosen.

weightFactor.label: Weight factor
weightFactor.description: Additional multiplier applied to the base weight during selection.
